english: Kali, Kali, Mahakali, Kalike, the supreme Goddess
O Mother who brings all joy, the refuge — I bow to you
roman: Sarvananda kari mata sharanyam tvam namamyaham

english: Salutations, salutations to Mahakali, salutations to Bhadrakalika
O sword-bearing Mahakali, destroyer of all enemies
roman: Khadga haste Mahakali sarva shatru vinashini

english: The southern Kalika the fierce, Tarini who takes one across existence
roman: Dakshine Kalika raudri Tarini bhava parada

english: The Goddess who dwells in the cremation ground, bestower of all powers
roman: Shmasana vasini Devi sarva siddhi pradayini

english: This Kalika Ashtakam — whoever reads it daily with reverence
roman: Kalika ashtakam idam yah pathet nityam adratah

english: All fears are destroyed by the auspicious grace of Kali
roman: Sarva bhayam nashayati Kalyah prasadatah shubham
